title: bronus arvensis subsp. patulus
intro: Bronus arvensis subsp. patulus, also known as false brome or meadow brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Bronus arvensis subsp. patulus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support immune function. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
